messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-515 — Gherkin lint gate: fail loudly on a silently-dropped wrapped step line (2nd line + its params)
What it solves: WHAT / WHY: a Gherkin step whose text wraps onto a second physical line has that line —
and any <parameters> on it — SILENTLY DROPPED by the vendored APS gherkin-parser, while
swarmforge/scripts/gherkin_lint_gate.sh reports "parses cleanly" (exit 0). This is a
silent correctness hole in the accepta…
Approval context: A swarm-surfaced tooling bug the coder hit while building BL-511: a Gherkin step whose text wraps onto a second line has that line and any <params> on it SILENTLY dropped by the vendored APS parser, and our lint gate says "parses cleanly" — so the acceptance contract quietly differs from what's wri…
BL-515 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-515" (or "reject BL-515 <reason>") to act.
